---
title: "initial workflow"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-08"
---
Required libraries
```{r}
library("tidyverse")
library("janitor")
library("naniar")
```



initial data reading and cleaning
```{r}
atlantic_argos <- read_csv("../input_files/AtlanticArgos.csv")

pacific_argos <- read_csv("../input_files/PacificArgos.csv")

pacific_tad <- read_csv("../input_files/Pacific_TAD.csv") %>% 
  clean_names()
```
required libraries
```{r}
library(akima)
library(viridis)
library(ggmap)
```
```{r}
register_stadiamaps("0ca4e2d5-36a9-4a89-ab81-cfc2f0ec1652", write = FALSE)

hull <- pacific_tad %>%
  slice(chull(lon, lat))

bbox <- c(
  left = min(pacific_tad$lon),
  bottom = min(pacific_tad$lat),
  right = max(pacific_tad$lon),
  top = max(pacific_tad$lat)
)

basemap <- get_stadiamap(
  bbox = bbox,
  zoom = 7,
  maptype = "alidade_smooth"
)

ggmap(basemap) +
  geom_polygon(
    data = hull,
    aes(lon, lat),
    fill = "white",
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Sampled Region of Pacific Mako Sharks",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )

```
```{r}
library(maps)

world <- map_data("world")
```


```{r}
deepdata <- pacific_tad %>%
  mutate(
    deep_time = b100 + b150 + b200 + b_200
  )

interp_data <- with(deepdata, interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = deep_time, duplicate = "mean"))

interp_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = interp_data$x,
  lat = interp_data$y
)

interp_df$deep_time <- as.vector(interp_data$z)
ggplot(interp_df, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = deep_time)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Proportion Time >100 m",
                       limits = c(0,1),
                       option = "cividis") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )

ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = interp_df, aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = deep_time)) +

  geom_polygon(data = world,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "white",
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 0.2) +
  
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "Proportion Time >100 m",
    limits = c(0,1),
    option = "cividis",
    na.value = NA
  ) +
  coord_fixed(
  xlim = range(interp_df$lon) + c(-2,2),
  ylim = range(interp_df$lat) + c(-2,2)
  )+
  
  
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title = "Spatial Heatmap of Deep Diving Behavior",
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )
  
```

```{r}
sst_interp <- with(pacific_tad,
  interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = sst, duplicate = "mean")
)

sst_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = sst_interp$x,
  lat = sst_interp$y
)

sst_df$SST <- as.vector(sst_interp$z)


ggplot(sst_df, aes(lon, lat, fill = SST)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Sea Surface Temp (°C)",
                       option = "magma") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )
```
```{r}
do_interp <- with(pacific_tad,
  interp(x = lon, y = lat, z = do_depth, duplicate = "mean")
)

do_df <- expand.grid(
  lon = do_interp$x,
  lat = do_interp$y
)

do_df$DO_depth <- as.vector(do_interp$z)

ggplot(do_df, aes(lon, lat, fill = DO_depth)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Hypoxic Boundary Depth (m)") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Longitude",
    y = "Latitude"
  )
```

trend graphs of dive depth to do depth
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b_50) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b_50)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b100) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b100)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b150) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b150)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, do_depth, b_200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = do_depth,
      y = b_200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```

trends of surface temperature to dive depth
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b_50) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b_50)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b100) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b100)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b150) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b150)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```
```{r}
pacific_tad %>% 
  select(id, sst, b_200) %>% 
  ggplot(
    mapping = aes(
      x = sst,
      y = b_200)
    )+
    geom_point(
      alpha = 0.5)+
    geom_smooth(
      se = FALSE,
      method = lm
    )+
    theme_classic()+
    labs(
      x = "Ocean Surface Temperature",
      y = "Proportion of Time"
    )
```




niche of sharks
```{r}
ggplot(pacific_tad, aes(x = sst, y = do_depth)) +
  stat_density_2d(
    aes(fill = after_stat(level)),
    geom = "polygon",
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(name = "Use Density",
                      option = "cividis") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Temperature–Oxygen habitat envelope",
    x = "Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen"
  )
```

```{r}
depth_long <- pacific_tad %>% 
  mutate(
      depth_zone = case_when(
        do_depth < 100 ~ "Above 100 m",
        do_depth >= 100 & do_depth <= 200 ~ "100-200 m",
        do_depth > 200 ~ "Below 200 m"
      )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(b_50, b100, b150, b200, b_200),
    names_to = "depth_bin",
    values_to = "time_prop"
  )

depth_long$depth_bin <- factor(
  depth_long$depth_bin,
  levels = c("b_50","b100","b150","b200","b_200")
)

depth_long$depth_zone <- factor(
  depth_long$depth_zone,
  levels = c("Above 100 m", "100-200 m", "Below 200 m")
)

ggplot(depth_long, aes(x = depth_bin, y = time_prop)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal()+
  coord_flip()+
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Time Spent at Each Depth by Depth of ",
    x = "Depth Bin",
    y = "Proportion of Time"
  )+
  facet_wrap(~depth_zone)
```
